streaming status

  1. Home
  2. rule
  3. North America
  4. Canada

Canada

How to Distinguish

  • The domain is .ca
  • Speed ​​limit notation MAXIMUM
  • If the sign with a reverse ▽ sign says YIELD America, if it is not written Canada become

Signs you can find

Representative Companies

    Speed ​​limit notation MAXIMUM.If the sign has km/h written on a white background british columbia, if you have French quebec, the km notation on the black background is Ontario Become.Americateeth SPEED LIMIT.

    In Canada, there are no words on YEILD or ONEWAY signs.Canada on the left, America on the right.

    There are many posts like this.It should say CANADA POST somewhere.

    There is a sign that looks like a checkerboard.

    Banks written as TD are affiliated with Toronto-Dominion Bank.RBC stands for Royal Bank of Canada.They are the 2nd and 1st largest asset size in Japan, respectively.

    Canada is home to many midstream companies that manage oil and natural gas pipelines.However, it is hardly visible on Street View (because it is located far from the street).Representative companies include Devon, Pembina pipeline, and Enbridge.There may also be companies that produce oil sands and natural gas, such as Canadian Natural Resources, if you go deep into the mountains.

    Narrow down state/region

    • Some states require license plates on the front and back, while others do not.
      • The license plate is green on both sides.Manitoba
      • The overall blue license plate ontario there is a possibility of
      • The bottom left is reddish Prince Edward Island(References Vehicle registration plates of Prince Edward Island)
      • plonkit's Canada pageis newly added and well organized, so refer to this for the rest.
    • Mountainous areas are limited

      Green areas require license plates front and back

      Let's remember Canada visually 🇨🇦 pic.twitter.com/R4nUSLIR7D

      — Masuharu.(@Masuharu_fn) April 12, 2025
      (OC) map of all canadian license plate and rear/front plate obligated
      byu/ehe78 ingeoguessr

      The yellow-green areas are flat, and the brown areas are steep mountains.It turns out that British Columbia has almost no flat areas outside of the Vancouver area..The yellow area is an area with widespread mountains and hills that are not that high..

      things on the road

      • STOP signboards vary slightly depending on the region.
        • Inuktitut (Inuktitut language) can be found in Ilkluit, Nunavut.
        • ARRET is quebec
        • If STOP and ARRET are written together,new brunswick and Ontario
      • Speed ​​limit signs vary slightly depending on the region.
        • If there is km/h notation on a white background british columbia
        • If you speak French quebec
        • The km notation on the black background is Ontario
      • There's something like a blue cap on the lamp.nova scotia many in(References Comprehensive Canada - Davis Savage)
      • black and orange cone Ontario・White and orange cones quebec(References Comprehensive Canada - Davis Savage)
      • When the telephone poles divided 2:1 are repeated alternately,saskatchewan many in(from 『15 Geoguessr Tips and Metas That Will Boost Your Scores@zi8gzag』)

        The road connecting Ontario and Manitoba Ontario On the side sign, the km/h part is on a black background.It is also sometimes written in orange and black.

        The road connecting Ontario and Manitoba Manitoba The speed sign on the side does not have a black background.

        The black and orange cone on the left is Ontario・The white and orange cone on the right quebec things of

        When the telephone poles divided 2:1 are repeated alternately,saskatchewan many in(from 『15 Geoguessr Tips and Metas That Will Boost Your Scores@zi8gzag』).2:1→1:2→2:1→…

        bollard

        • The bollard is thin and has a red reflector on top.quebec
        • There is a plate with ◆Ontario(References Comprehensive Canada - Davis Savage)

          Bollards with thin, dark red reflectors are quebec state.AmericaThere is a similar bollard inJust pay attention to the points.

          Common in Ontario.Some are not colored.

          distribution of agriculture

          • Flat wheat fields spread across Saskatchewan and Alberta.
          • Corn is abundant around Toronto.(References U.S. Department of Agriculture(USDA))

            Soybeans and corn are abundant around Toronto.(References Canada - Crop Production Maps(USDA)).

            Description of representative companies

            Company name code explanation settlement of accounts Dividend history
            Pembina Pipeline NASDAQ A major midstream oil and natural gas company. Dividend History
            Canadian National Railway NASDAQ CNR is Canada's largest railway company, and the only railway in Canada that crosses the continent is CNR. Dividend History
            Teck Resources NASDAQ Engaged in metals and mining.The company mainly handles coal, zinc, and copper for steelmaking (more than 90% of its revenue), and also handles secondary products such as lead, gold, and molybdenum. Dividend History
            Nutrien NASDAQ The world's second largest fertilizer manufacturer.No. 1 in potash fertilizer production, and No. 2 in the world in nitrogen fertilizer production. Dividend History
            Cameco NASDAQ It is the largest listed uranium mining company in the world (it is believed).Canada is the second largest producer of uranium after Kazakhstan.(References Upstream sector of uranium resources - Published in IEEJ March 2020). Dividend History
